arts.ttl: Oliver Glasner delivers assessment on Crystal Palace’s transfer window
arts.sum: “We defined the targets, positions and profiles very early – far before the transfer window. The Eagles signed Romain Esse from local rivals Millwall in a £14.5million deal and also loaned in Ben Chilwell from Chelsea on deadline day for the rest of the season.
